title: polypodium nummulariifolium
intro: Polypodium nummulariifolium, also known as Dollar Fern, is a type of fern native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, coin-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium nummulariifolium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
